envelope_migration.reason: closed sync/status payloads and strict schedule lifecycle contracts changed

contract.product_core: CLI-first local retrieval with strict --json envelopes and SQLite/Tantivy behavior
contract.schema_object_closure: released schema object shapes are closed by default; only envelope.data and error.details are documented extension points
contract.human_output: default successful CLI stdout is command-specific human summaries; pass --json for stable qgh.v2 envelopes
contract.release_trigger: Cargo.toml version bump commit plus matching vX.Y.Z tag push

release_workflow.ci_generated_config_policy: allow-dirty ci preserves the hand-edited vX.Y.Z tag trigger and Homebrew smoke workflow

contract.init_behavior: top-level init previews inferred profile/repo defaults before writing; Enter/Y fixes the displayed profile, n customizes, EOF cancels without writes; init --yes and init -y apply non-interactively; init repo is repo-policy-only

init_profile_selection.promptless_auto: latest locked config snapshot; single repo-and-host match, then single same-host match, then collision-safe host-derived id

contract.repo_policy_publication: preflight plus apply-time CAS; no-replace create; staged atomic force replace; final symlink and non-regular entries fail closed

get_batch.lifecycle_check_policy: CLI opt-in verify_lifecycle; sequential max_in_flight_requests=1 when enabled; MCP get remains local-only

sync_scheduler.rate_budget_observation: best-effort content-free response headers; status is local-only

schedule.foreground_policy: host serial; shared gate before every send; unknown budget max 1 probe request and 1 profile per unknown-start pass; observed reserve 20%; max 1 per profile; max 8 per pass
schedule.host_budget_guard: content-free per-host write-ahead guard; active backoff or uncertain started request survives process exit; reset/backoff deadline or 5 minute fallback; 24 hour cap
schedule.physical_catch_up_observation: required manual workflow evidence; not simulated

contract.mcp_role: optional read-only thin adapter over the CLI JSON/local retrieval contract
post_mvp_or_excluded_behavior: vector as a mandatory BM25 dependency

excluded_from_mvp_gate.reason: optional local vector/hybrid capability is shipped and hardened, but BM25-only remains the complete mandatory MVP gate
GHES is best-effort profile capability and not a release gate

verification: LaunchAgent and systemd user timer lifecycle
residual_risks: Qwen default evidence uses a previously opened split and incomplete large resource qualification; it is not a fresh-blind general promotion claim
Qwen weights require an explicit separate model install and the canonical 80-query adapter artifact did not measure peak RSS
hosted provider quality improvements require an explicit future privacy decision
shared server and GitHub App token operations require separate ACL and audit design
GHES remains best-effort until a dedicated compatibility pass
Linux ARM64, Windows packages, and homebrew/core submission are later distribution targets
Public unauthenticated Homebrew installs require the qgh repository and release assets to remain public
Live dogfood against juicyjusung/qgh is manual and not a blocking CI gate
Scheduled Linux execution requires an active systemd user manager; qgh installs no cron fallback
